title: Agent Decision Output
description: Canonical JSON Schema for all Pi Agent decision outputs. Every agent decision MUST validate against this schema before it is persisted to ai.llm_decision.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Must be 'decision_output.v1' or empty string for legacy decisions.

decision_type.description: The classification of the decision type.

severity.description: The severity level of the decision.

rationale.description: List of reasoning steps that led to the decision.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the decision, between 0.0 and 1.0.

requires_human_review.description: Whether this decision requires human review before any action is taken. Phase 6 guardrail: must be true.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence items that support the decision (e.g., metric:seller_late_delivery_rate_7d).

requires_approval.description: Whether the recommended actions require explicit approval before execution.

RecommendedAction.description: A single action recommended by the agent decision.

priority.description: Priority level for this action (e.g., low, medium, high, critical).

owner_role.description: The role responsible for executing this action.

payload.description: Action-specific parameters as a JSON object.
